title: . Qualifications of health personnel. The physicians, dentists and nurses employed by employers
content:
. Qualifications of health personnel. The physicians, dentists and nurses employed by employers 
pursuant to this Chapter shall have the necessary training in industrial medicine and occupational safety and 
health. The Secretary of Labor and Employment, in consultation with industrial, medical, and occupational 
safety and health associations, shall establish the qualifications, criteria and conditions of employment of such 
health personnel.
